title: Phase 14: SPPID Sheet Geometry Primitive Decoders
objective: Promote at least one Sheet geometry primitive (PrimitiveLine / Polyline / Circle / Arc / TextPlacementStyle / SymbolPlacement / CoordinatePageMetadata) from inferred or probe-only to PidGeometryConfidence::Decoded, with byte-range provenance sourced from IDA Pro analysis of acquired SPPID rad2d.dll and pidobjectmanager.dll.
evidence: Initial scaffold created; critical documents still require Plannotator gate approval.

Filesystem-wide scan across C/D/E plus WeChat transfer folder returned no SmartPlant primitive parser DLL candidates. SmartPlant P&ID install is not present on this workstation. User action required: copy rad2d.dll + pidobjectmanager.dll from a workstation that has SmartPlant P&ID installed (typically C:\Program Files (x86)\SmartPlant\P&ID\bin\) into E:\weixin\xwechat_files\happydpc_b2ec\msg\file\2026-05\bin or directly into dlls/.

conclusion: import-level confirmation: none of the 8 SPPID binaries calls CFB stream APIs (IStorage/IStream/OpenStream/CreateStream/ole32 stream methods). Slice A cannot start; B1 (rad2d.dll/pidobjectmanager.dll acquisition) is hard-blocked.

radsrvitem.dll is the sole binary importing StgOpenStorageEx among the 18 new candidates. It is the Sheet primitive byte parser entry point. Phase 14 plan called for rad2d.dll/pidobjectmanager.dll; the actual Intergraph build ships this functionality in radsrvitem.dll instead.
next_action: user to open radsrvitem.dll in IDA Pro; IDA-MCP server will auto-attach; agent resumes slice-a-runbook from step 2

byte_layout: type(2 LE) + bytes_to_follow(4 LE) + oid(4 LE) + aux(8) + inner_payload(var)

ac_progress.AC2: effectively done (PSMSerialize byte layout > OpenStream callsite hunt for evidence purposes)
ac_progress.AC3: partial (record kind dispatch is via 14-bit type + guidtab.h + vtable, not classic switch)

factory_pattern_finding: IGDSFactory vtable slots 4-6 are property setters (set this+70/74/78), not Save entry
next_step: find IJTypedGeometry2d::Save in vtable OR cross-check 6xf64 layout against DWG-0201GP06-01.pid /Sheet6 bytes

acceptance_criteria.AC8: pending Slice E (no regression check yet)

next_step: Slice E: wire decoded lines into geometry.rs / PidGeometryConfidence::Decoded with anti-regression on 49 inferred lines

probe_hits_distribution: DWG-0201:3, DWG-0202:1 - all type 0x0001 vc=4 - suspicious (first 2 vertices all 0,0)
blocker: need to decompile PSMSerializeOut GLineString2d branch OR find type code in dispatcher to confirm on-disk layout
action: stop here, document evidence base in docs/analysis/2026-05-14-radsrvitem-psm-serialize-bytes.md - future session resumes by decompiling more radsrvitem functions or capturing controlled-diff polyline fixture

key_findings: IGDS class tags != PSM record type codes - two separate ID systems
all other types including geometry classes go through IJPersist vtable dispatch
impact: need to decompile PSMSerializeIn switch + IJPersist::Save vtable per class to find PSM type codes for polyline/circle/text/etc
next_session_actions: decompile sub_564915E0 (PSMSerializeIn) for type code dispatch table
trace IJPersist vtable per geometry class
capture polyline fixture via Plan B controlled-diff

architecture_finding: PSMSerializeIn symmetric to PSMSerializeOut - both use IJPersist vtable dispatch for non-fixed-size records
static_type_table_lookup: sub_564689C0 walks guidtab.h table via *(v43+18) chain
actionable_next_steps: decompile sub_564689C0 to extract guidtab.h table data pointer
dump .rdata table to enumerate (PSM type code, GUID, factory) triples
find IJPersist::Save vtable slot per geometry class (igLineString2d etc) via RTTI
impact: polyline/circle/text decoder requires per-class vtable Save decompile - no static switch shortcut

finding: table entries are registered by individual IGDSFactory* class module init at DLL load - distributed registration not centralized
next_session_actions: find static initializers across binary that write to dword_567DDC90 (PSMComTypeEntry register calls)
OR find IGDSFactoryLineString constructor and trace its registration
OR runtime IDA debugger to dump dword_567DDC90 contents directly

key_finding: GArc2d 8 doubles 中部分不是几何向量 - a2+32 是 angle (rad) 用于 sin/cos，a2+40 是 BYTE form flag; axis1.y 多次 = π/2/π/3π/2 表明可能是 rotation 而非 vector y
decoder_status: 不受影响 - SheetPrimitiveArcDecoded 验证设计是 conservative, fixture 记录仍能通过
action: 仅文档记录语义错位，不重构 DTO 字段名避免基于不完整证据重构，下一 session 完整语义拿取后联动更新

old_dto_field_mapping: axis2.x → axis_ratio (single value not vector); axis2.y → sweep_direction byte + padding; param_start/end correct
decoder_impact: byte-level correct, naming wrong, radius/is_circular calc need rework in next milestone
next_milestone_actions: fix geometry.rs radius=axis1_magnitude() to use axis_a single

residual_puzzle: axis_ratio=0 in 66/66 records contradicts SmartPlant having real circles - a2+32 semantic deeper than simple axis_b/axis_a ratio
next_milestone: resolve axis_ratio semantic OR move to polyline/circle/text decoder family

key_finding: GArc2d = GEllipse2d (0..47) + sweep (48..63); a2+32 is GEllipse2d internal field (eccentricity or semi-minor), not simple axis ratio
constraint_discovered: GEllipse2d::Validate enforces majorAxis along X axis - records with axis.y != 0 should fail; DWG-0202 has many type 0x0030 records with axis_y=pi/2/pi/3pi/2 which contradicts being GArc2d/GEllipse2d
conclusion: some 0x0030 hits in fixtures may be a different PSM type passing my conservative validation - need to find true GArc2d type code OR refine axis_y=0 constraint
slice_h_field_names: byte positions correct, geometric semantic interpretation needs more research
next_milestone: resolve axis_y=0 constraint vs fixture data OR check if there are multiple PSM types collapsing to 0x0030 in 14-bit mask

critical_finding: a2+32/+48/+56 are packed u16/u32 integer fields, NOT f64 doubles - my decoder accepts records that are likely NOT real GArc2d
impact: 66 decoded arcs across fixtures are mostly false positives - geometric semantic of axis_ratio/sweep_direction/sweep_*_angle wrong; byte 0..31 (center+axis-region) likely correct; only type code 0x0030 + 32..63 layout assumption is broken
decoder_safety: panic-safe + type code filter still works, provenance fields valid, contract test still passes via synthetic data
next_milestone_critical: reverse engineer IGDSFactoryArc constructor OR PSMSerializeIn switch to find true GArc2d PSM type code; possibly 0x0030 is placeholder/collision for multiple types

gellipse2d_constraint_source: radsrvitem.dll!sub_56524280 IMElVal2dInfo majorAxis along x error
residual: a2+32..63 深入语义沉未 nailed down, byte-level 解析正确但几何字段释义待下一 milestone
